title: GameStop Q3 2024 Earnings: Mixed Results
text: GameStop released its Q3 2024 earnings report showing contradictory performance metrics. The gaming retailer generated $860 million in revenue, falling short of analyst expectations of $888 million. This represents a shortfall in the company's top-line performance during the quarter. Despite missing revenue targets, GameStop achieved profitability on a per-share basis. The company earned $0.04 per share, exceeding the projected loss of $0.06 per share—a notable turnaround from expectations. The earnings announcement sparked investor enthusiasm. GameStop's stock climbed sharply in after-hours trading, rising from a closing price of $26.95 to as high as $30.60, indicating market optimism about the results. The earnings disclosure revealed that GameStop reported 71 million directly registered shares as of December 4, 2024, providing insight into the company's share structure during this period. The mixed results highlight ongoing challenges in the retail gaming sector while demonstrating the company's ability to achieve profitability despite revenue headwinds.
